exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your stock trading forward
items: Complete a basic financial assessment and determine your investment budget
Research and compare 3-5 reputable brokerage platforms and open your first trading account
Study and document the basics of 5 key stock market concepts: market cap, P/E ratio, dividend yield, volatility, and diversification
Set up a paper trading account and practice buying/selling 10 different stocks over 2 weeks
Create a personalized investment thesis document outlining your trading goals, risk tolerance, and time horizon
Research and analyze 5 companies from different sectors to understand how to read and interpret financial statements
